feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content:
Hello ILM experts,

As described in the help portal page for ILM Advisor app, the default licensed memory size is 100 GB.
Is this applicable for any customers? If so, can a customer request to expand the memory size more than 100 GB? I guess the customer needs to create a case from SAP for me. What is the component for the case?

Additionally, what is the maximum size for the licensed memory? I found a description regarding the maximum memory size chart by FUEs in the "GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Service Use Descriptions".

Is this also applicable for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: IS THERE ANY ALTERNATIVE OF MC.9 IN PUBLIC CLOUD 2408
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

IS THERE ANY ALTERNATIVE OF MC.9 IN PUBLIC CLOUD 2408

entry.title: how to do the background scheduling in Public Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can anyone tell the steps that how to do the background scheduling in Public Cloud 2408.

entry.title: ES接口数据创建时间如何更改为用户所在时区
entry.content: hello，工程师 麻烦问下，ES接口数据记录中的创建时间默认是UTC+0时区，是否可以设置自动转换为系统账号所在时区的时间？

entry.title: ES接口数据创建时间如何更改为用户所在时区
entry.content: hello，工程师 麻烦问下，ES接口数据记录中的创建时间默认是UTC+0时区，是否可以设置自动转换为系统账号所在时区的时间？

entry.title: RAP - Mandatory fields Popup
entry.content:
Hi, I have a question. I have application with mandatory field and dialog popup show correctly. But I have a problem with button Craete becouse if I don't press button GO before Button Create is not open form for new record. Do you heve any idea?

Thanks

entry.title: How to expand default memory size for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hello ILM experts,

As described in the help portal page for ILM Advisor app, the default licensed memory size is 100 GB.
Does the default memory size of 100GB apply to all customer production systems?
How can a customer request to expand the memory size more than 100 GB if required?

entry.title: 合并报表的所有者权益变动表怎么实现
entry.content: 目前的系统是S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 的版本，合并报表的所有者权益变动表怎么实现？

entry.title: CDS View for Routing Operation Overview
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a task which is to create an Analytical Query based on the view Display Routing: Operation Overview. I can't seem to find the corresponding CDS View for the task. May I ask if there is a CDS View for this app or it is not available?

Many thanks,

Lam

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Segmentation (LO-SGT) Function Confirmation
entry.content:
Dear all,

Right now we are facing following business requirement and its background is as following:

  1. Background: For different FERT product (FERT A & FERT B) have common raw material called ROH 1. Both FERTs are manufactured through external manufacturing (EM) process (Subcontracting). For convenience, raw material ROH1 will be sent to different subcontractor (EM) directly. So they use storage location in PR to identify each EM. 
  2. As-Is (Right now process W/O segment function): Right now, users will create P.I.R for FERT A & FERT B, and after MRP run, the PR for ROH1 will be combined into one PR when required date is same. In order to fulfill their requirement (ROH sent to EM directly), they need to manually change PR, either create new line item or just manually create a new PR with different storage location (for EM). This methods need much manually work and check
  3. Required function (Process below with Segment): We hope enable standard segment function in SAP public cloud, and set different subcontractor (EM) as Segment. Thus, when we create P.I.R, we can use maintain segment to identify different requirement. And with segment, after MRP run, system should auto generate 2 different PR for different EM.

Right now, in SAP Public Cloud, we do not find any configuration point to activate segment function. Can you please help us on this?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud QM function : COA form printting
entry.content:
Dear all,

Our client is using SAP public cloud edition, and they are going to enable QM function and we are facing following questions:

1. CoA format printing or PDF download: the COA for different product is different, not sure if standard SAP Public Cloud supports this requirement?

2. Specific Reporting: we assume there should be 2 methods for customized reporting in SAP Public Cloud Solution A - Realized in SAC:

  • Is there an embedded SAC supported for public cloud? Or they must be used the standalone SAC
  • What kind of cost that AXM need to spend on SAP product for this solution?

Solution B - APIs to get QM data from SAP and then Other Platform to develop

  • Is there a set of standard APIs to support getting all those kind of quality data?
  • Could you please to provide a list for those APIs?

Thanks

entry.title: 供应商发票导入
entry.content: 在导入供应商发票中，无法在导入模版内修改该供应商的对账科目，是否有其他APP可解决？

entry.title: Make Putaway quantity Field mandatory in Inbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a requirement of making "Putaway quantity" field mandatory in Inbound delivery.

Kindly provide possible way to make the field mandatory in the SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.

Thanks.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage Preferred Supplier List
entry.content: What can the users use instead of Manage Preferred Supplier list as no longer available in 2408?

entry.title: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XML) simultaneously?
entry.content:
Hi

I understand that outputting CSV files in S/4 HANA Public Cloud is difficult.
When attempting to output a PDF, an XML file is generated in the background and then converted to PDF.

Question 1: Is there a location where the XML file is stored in the background? Or is the XML file deleted as a cache file during PDF generation?

Question 2: If we cannot access the XML file as mentioned above, I'm considering connecting the purchase order number with BTP through email sending settings, accessing the purchase order data on the BTP side, and creating a CSV file. Are there any other good alternative solutions?

entry.title: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition in 4 countries in the EU (Czechia, Slovakia, Poland and Hungary). We have purchased the license for Document and Report Compliance cloud edition (8008260), but up to now have not activated the license for Document and Reporting Compliance for S/4HANA (8013658).

5XU (Document and Reporting Compliance) has always been a scope item in the project, already listed in the DDA. But now, at the end of the Explore phase, it seems like 5XU specifically requires the license for DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) if we want to activate it. Ultimately it all boils down to the need for VAT Report previews, which is essential for us. Without the additional license, it seems like we cannot preview VAT reports.

My main question is if there is any way for VAT Reports to be previewed without requiring the DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) license, or scope item 5XU?

Also, where can I find accurate information about what DRC licenses are required for 5XU?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: CONDITION MWBO EXCLUSION AGAINST SPECIFIC VAT CODE
entry.content:
Is it possible to manage this case using the standard customizing or we can manage it only with a custom routine to be inserted on BOLL condition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Credit Management Reporting app is disappear event there is a business catalog assigned.
entry.content:
Credit Management Reporting app is disappeared event I've assigned the business catalog "SAP_FIN_BC_CR_ADV_ANALY_PC" to the business role "ALLBR_CREDIT_CONTROLLER". Please kindly help to check why it's still disappeared.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatically block Concur expense posting for every WBS
entry.content:
Hello,

 

When creating a WBS, we can manually block posting from Concur Expenses.

Is there an option to block this automatically for every WBS created?

Thank You
